2008.issue: [S2008] Version 2.1.2 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3021.issue: [S3021] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 22. Consider updating to the recommended version 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 22 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v2.1.2" was found for current release 2.1.2. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/wss.js, [main.js](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.wolf-smartset/blob/master/main.js)). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5032.issue: [S5032] "lib/tools.js" found in repo but not used anywhere. Consider removing file.

5063.issue: [W5063] JSON formatting in "admin/jsonConfig.json" is hard to read (mixed indentation). Please use consistent indentation and proper line breaks.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/tab_2/items/bundleIdTable/items[2]" attribute "tooltip" uses key "Request Params with this BundleId in Long Poll Cycle" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6009.issue: [W6009] Multiple copyright lines found in [README.md](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.wolf-smartset/blob/master/README.md) but line(s) 4 missing trailing spaces. Add two spaces at end of each copyright line (except last) for proper formatting.

6023.issue: [W6023] Sentry plugin is configured in [io-package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.wolf-smartset/blob/master/io-package.json) but the required Sentry information was not found in [README.md](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.wolf-smartset/blob/master/README.md). Please add the standard Sentry notice near the top of [README.md](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.wolf-smartset/blob/master/README.md).

7003.issue: [W7003] Multiple copyright lines found in LICENSE but line(s) 3 missing trailing spaces. Add two spaces at end of each copyright line (except last) for proper formatting.
